2000February 14, 2000

🇦🇺 Melbourne, Australia

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Melbourne, Australia, February 14, 2000 -- February 18, 2000

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2000-02-melbourne-australia

22 Resolutions

454Plenary
Support cooperation between SC 4 and Object Management Group
SC4 fully supports and looks forward to working with the OMG organization to achieve mutual benefits in the development, balloting, and accreditation of appropriate specifications which qualify as ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
453Plenary
Accept amendments to SC 4 Organization Handbook defined in QC N123
SC4 resolves to accept the amendments to the SC4 Organization Handbook as defined in SC4 QC N123, with immediate effect.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
452Plenary
Request VAMAS establish Category A liaison with SC 4
SC4 requests the Versailles Project on Advanced Materials and Standards (VAMAS) to establish a Category A liaison with SC4, directed particularly at Technical Working Area (TWA) 10.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
451Plenary
Establish liaison with ISO/TC 207/SC 5 and appoint Dr. Anna Moreno
SC4 accepts the request from ISO/TC 207/SC 5 to establish a liaison and appoints Dr. Anna Moreno as the liaison officer from SC4 to ISO/TC 207/SC 5.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
450Plenary
Recommend ISO/CS publish new edition of ISO Directives and recognize Sophie Clivio
SC4 recognizes the excellence of the support and advice of Mrs. Sophie Clivio in the interpretation and explanation of the ISO Directives and the many TMB decisions complementing the Directives.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
449Plenary
Amend Organisation Handbook on Technical Specifications balloting
SC4 requests its secretariat to amend the Organisation Handbook as follows: Amend Clause 2.3 to add reference to Technical Specifications "...... (CD) or Preliminary Draft Technical Specification (...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
448Plenary
Terminate direct liaisons with inactive organisations
SC4 resolves to terminate its direct liaisons with the following organisations: * CAM-I * UN/ECE * ISO/IEC JTC 1 SC 24 * ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 14 * ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 21/WG 3 * ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 21/WG 3/CS...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
447Plenary
Accept WG 11 recommendation to change title of ISO 10303-28
SC4 accepts the recommendation of WG 11 to change the title of ISO 10303-28 to: Product data representation and exchange: Implementation methods: XML representation of EXPRESS schemas and data.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
445Plenary
Encourage OMG to accept UML and EXPRESS interoperability
SC4 encourages OMG to accept interoperability between UML and EXPRESS (ISO 10303-11) as a mandatory requirement in the UML 2.0 development effort.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
444Plenary
Appoint Tom Warren and Julian Fowler to Quality Committee roles
SC4 appoints Tom Warren as Coordinator of the Quality Committee, and Julian Fowler as Deputy Coordinator of the Quality Committee.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
443Plenary
Revise operation of the Quality Committee in SC 4 Handbook
SC4 directs its Secretariat to make the following changes to the SC4 Handbook (SC 4 N935). replace 6.3.1 by the following: 6.3.1 Tasks The Quality Committee performs the following tasks and activit...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
442Plenary
Clarify the SEDS process in the SC 4 Handbook
SC4 directs its Secretariat to make the following changes to the SC4 Handbook. Add the following to the first sentence of 3.3 (added text italicized): ... the use of the SC4 Standards and Standing ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
441Plenary
Cancel AP230 and its associated ATS 330
SC4 resolves to cancel AP230 and its associated ATS 330- Building Structural Frame: Steelwork.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
440Plenary
Approve project leaders and editors for ISO 10303 projects
SC4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC4 projects: |=== |ISO Project |Project Lead |Document Editor |10303-108 |Mike Pratt | |10303-28 |Peter Bergstr...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

SC4 thanks Nigel Shaw and Daniel Rivers-Moore for their effort as project leader under WG 11.

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its appreciation to the Convenors, Project Leaders and Rapporteurs for their efforts in support of the work of SC4 and for the preparation of the reports that reflect these activities.

Acclamation
SC4 expresses its appreciation to the Drafting Committee for the completion of its resolutions.

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
